release.name: Release 1.4.0 — streaming responses + token budget
release.body:
## What's new

### Streaming responses
All API calls now support `stream=True`, cutting time-to-first-token by ~60% on long generations.

### Token budget control
Set `max_tokens` per request or globally in config. Hard limits prevent runaway costs on batch jobs.

### Breaking change
`client.complete()` is removed — use `client.messages.create()` (deprecated since v1.2).

## Install
```
pip install mylib==1.4.0
```
